title: Mass Edit
overview: After running a query, select multiple rows and open Mass Edit to update fields in a layout-style form. Enter values once, apply them to all selected rows, and save—supporting blank updates even when no field values change.
generalUseCase: Use Mass Edit to make consistent changes across many query results at once—set field values in a single form, apply them to all selected records, and optionally perform a blank update when you need to trigger downstream logic without changing data.
